title: Mysql优化查询速度
text: 由于业务逻辑有点复杂，sql语句中关联了很多表和子查询，4W条数据查询时间要800多秒，经过大师指导成功缩减到秒级 先看原来的sql 12345678910111213141516171819202122232425262728293031323334353637383940414243444546474849505152535455565758596061626364656667686970717273747576777879808182838485868788899091SELECT a.id, F.fidl01 AS 区域, v.org_name AS 组织, E.FIDL02, b.fian86 AS 售至地址号, a.business_partner_no AS 运至地址号, a.partner_name AS 客户名称, (select fidl01 from jde_vi0005 where fisy='01' and firt = '09' and fiky =(SELECT fiac09 FROM jde_vi0101 WHERE fIAN8 = a.business_partner_no limit 1)) AS 客户级别, (SELECT pnptd FROM jde_vf03012 WHERE AIAN8 = a.business_partner_no and aico = E.FIDL02 limit 1) AS 结款方式, H.selection_name AS 月均不锈钢需求量, i.selection_name AS 不锈钢紧固件占比, J.selection_name AS 客户忠诚度, G.selection_name AS 客户价值级别, C.lifecycle AS 生命周期, K.selection_name AS 不锈钢库存规模, C.store_details AS 店面详情, if((select L.compete_flag from business_compete_product_info L where L.partner_id=a.id and L.delete_flag=0 order by modify_time desc limit 1) = '1','是','否') 是否竞品, M.selection_name AS 企业销售类型, N.selection_name AS 客户形态, O.selection_name AS 客户类型, P.selection_name AS 主要合作障碍, Z.selection_name AS 客户发展潜力 , Q.selection_name AS 客户发展野心及规划, R.selection_name AS 市场拓客能力, S.selection_name AS 客户资源情况, T.selection_name AS 近年增长速度, U.selection_name AS 资金实力及信誉情况FROM business_partner a LEFT JOIN jde_vi0101 b ON a.business_partner_no = b.fian8 LEFT JOIN business_customer_info c ON c.partner_id = a.id LEFT JOIN JDE_VI0101 D ON A.business_partner_no = D.fian8 LEFT JOIN jde_vi0005 E ON D.fiac15 = E.fiky AND E.fisy = '01' AND E.firt = '15' LEFT JOIN jde_vi0005 F ON a.partner_region = F.fiky AND F.fisy = '01' AND F.firt = '13' LEFT JOIN prd_system_selection G #客户价值级别 ON G.selection_value = C.follow_visit_grade AND G.parent_id = '90084563917733892' LEFT JOIN prd_system_selection H #月均不锈钢需求量 ON H.selection_value = C.stainless_steel_demand_month AND H.parent_id = '90084563917733888' LEFT JOIN prd_system_selection I #不锈钢紧固件占比 ON I.selection_value = C.stainless_steel_fastener AND I.parent_id = '100827256377573460' LEFT JOIN prd_system_selection J #客户忠诚度 ON J.selection_value = C.loyalty AND J.parent_id = '90084563917733889' LEFT JOIN prd_system_selection K #不锈钢库存规模 ON K.selection_value = C.stainless_steel_scale AND K.parent_id = '100827256377573466' LEFT JOIN prd_system_selection M #企业销售类型 ON M.selection_value = C.enterprise_sale_type AND M.parent_id = '118561674558963735' LEFT JOIN prd_system_selection N #客户形态 ON N.selection_value = C.cust_form AND N.parent_id = '100470142731812879' LEFT JOIN prd_system_selection O #客户类型 ON O.selection_value = C.cust_type AND O.parent_id = '100827256377573495' LEFT JOIN prd_system_selection P #主要合作障碍 ON P.selection_value = C.major_barriers_cooperation AND P.parent_id = '100848383321702444' LEFT JOIN prd_system_selection Q #客户发展野心及规划 ON Q.selection_value = C.cust_develop_ambition_and_plan AND Q.parent_id = '100470142731812881' LEFT JOIN prd_system_selection R #市场拓客能力 ON R.selection_value = C.cust_market_develop_ability AND R.parent_id = '100470142731812882' LEFT JOIN prd_system_selection Z # 客户发展潜力 ON Z.selection_value = C.development_potential AND Z.parent_id = '90084563917733890' LEFT JOIN prd_system_selection S #客户资源情况 ON S.selection_value = C.cust_resource_situation AND S.parent_id = '100470142731812883' LEFT JOIN prd_system_selection T #近年增长速度 ON T.selection_value = C.recent_year_growth_speed AND T.parent_id = '100470142731812884' LEFT JOIN prd_system_selection U #资金实力及信誉情况 ON U.selection_value = C.financial_strength_and_reputation AND U.parent_id = '100470142731812885' left join prd_org_organization v on a.ext1 = v.org_codeWHERE 1=1and a.delete_flag = 0and a.blacklist_flag = 0#and v.id in ('93052729916653889') 又臭又硬又长 改良后查询速度2.6 秒 12345678910111213141516171819202122232425262728293031323334353637383940414243444546474849505152535455565758SELECT a.id, F.fidl01 AS 区域, v.org_name AS 组织, b.fian86 AS 售至地址号, a.business_partner_no AS 运至地址号, a.partner_name AS 客户名称, Y.fidl01 AS 客户级别, X.pnptd AS 结款方式, H.selection_name AS 月均不锈钢需求量, i.selection_name AS 不锈钢紧固件占比, J.selection_name AS 客户忠诚度, G.selection_name AS 客户价值级别, C.lifecycle AS 生命周期, K.selection_name AS 不锈钢库存规模, C.store_details AS 店面详情,IF ( W.compete_flag = '1', '是', '否' ) 是否竞品, M.selection_name AS 企业销售类型, N.selection_name AS 客户形态, O.selection_name AS 客户类型, P.selection_name AS 主要合作障碍, Z.selection_name AS 客户发展潜力, Q.selection_name AS 客户发展野心及规划, R.selection_name AS 市场拓客能力, S.selection_name AS 客户资源情况, T.selection_name AS 近年增长速度, U.selection_name AS 资金实力及信誉情况 FROM business_partner a LEFT JOIN jde_vi0101 b ON a.business_partner_no = b.fian8 LEFT JOIN business_customer_info c ON c.partner_id = a.id LEFT JOIN JDE_VI0101 D ON A.business_partner_no = D.fian8 LEFT JOIN ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT fiky, fidl01, fidl02 FROM jde_vi0005 WHERE fisy = '01' AND firt = '15' ) E_INNER ) E ON a.partner_region = E.fiky LEFT JOIN ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT fiky, fidl01, fidl02 FROM jde_vi0005 WHERE fisy = '01' AND firt = '13' ) F_INNER ) F ON a.partner_region = F.fiky LEFT JOIN ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT fiky, fidl01, fidl02 FROM jde_vi0005 WHERE fisy = '01' AND firt = '09' ) Y_INNER ) Y ON B.FIAC09 = Y.fiky LEFT JOIN ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT parent_id, selection_value, selection_name FROM prd_system_selection WHERE parent_id = '90084563917733892' ) G_INNER ) G ON G.selection_value = C.follow_visit_grade #客户价值级别 LEFT JOIN ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT parent_id, selection_value, selection_name FROM prd_system_selection WHERE parent_id = '90084563917733888' ) H_INNER ) H ON H.selection_value = C.stainless_steel_demand_month #月均不锈钢需求量 LEFT JOIN ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT parent_id, selection_value, selection_name FROM prd_system_selection WHERE parent_id = '100827256377573460' ) I_INNER ) I ON I.selection_value = C.stainless_steel_fastener #不锈钢紧固件占比 LEFT JOIN ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT parent_id, selection_value, selection_name FROM prd_system_selection WHERE parent_id = '90084563917733889' ) J_INNER ) J ON J.selection_value = C.loyalty #客户忠诚度 LEFT JOIN ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT parent_id, selection_value, selection_name FROM prd_system_selection WHERE parent_id = '100827256377573466' ) K_INNER ) K ON K.selection_value = C.stainless_steel_scale #不锈钢库存规模 LEFT JOIN ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT parent_id, selection_value, selection_name FROM prd_system_selection WHERE parent_id = '118561674558963735' ) M_INNER ) M ON M.selection_value = C.enterprise_sale_type #企业销售类型 LEFT JOIN ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT parent_id, selection_value, selection_name FROM prd_system_selection WHERE parent_id = '100470142731812879' ) N_INNER ) N ON N.selection_value = C.cust_form #客户形态 LEFT JOIN ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT parent_id, selection_value, selection_name FROM prd_system_selection WHERE parent_id = '100827256377573495' ) O_INNER ) O ON O.selection_value = C.cust_type #客户类型 LEFT JOIN ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT parent_id, selection_value, selection_name FROM prd_system_selection WHERE parent_id = '100848383321702444' ) P_INNER ) P ON P.selection_value = C.major_barriers_cooperation #主要合作障碍 LEFT JOIN ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT parent_id, selection_value, selection_name FROM prd_system_selection WHERE parent_id = '100470142731812881' ) Q_INNER ) Q ON Q.selection_value = C.cust_develop_ambition_and_plan #客户发展野心及规划 LEFT JOIN ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT parent_id, selection_value, selection_name FROM prd_system_selection WHERE parent_id = '100470142731812882' ) R_INNER ) R ON R.selection_value = C.cust_market_develop_ability #市场拓客能力 LEFT JOIN ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT parent_id, selection_value, selection_name FROM prd_system_selection WHERE parent_id = '90084563917733890' ) Z_INNER ) Z ON Z.selection_value = C.development_potential # 客户发展潜力 LEFT JOIN ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT parent_id, selection_value, selection_name FROM prd_system_selection WHERE parent_id = '100470142731812883' ) S_INNER ) S ON S.selection_value = C.cust_resource_situation #客户资源情况 LEFT JOIN ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT parent_id, selection_value, selection_name FROM prd_system_selection WHERE parent_id = '100470142731812884' ) T_INNER ) T ON T.selection_value = C.recent_year_growth_speed #近年增长速度 LEFT JOIN ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT parent_id, selection_value, selection_name FROM prd_system_selection WHERE parent_id = '100470142731812885' ) U_INNER ) U ON U.selection_value = C.financial_strength_and_reputation LEFT JOIN prd_org_organization v ON a.ext1 = v.org_code LEFT JOIN ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT partner_id, compete_flag FROM business_compete_product_info WHERE delete_flag = 0 ORDER BY modify_time DESC LIMIT 1 ) W_INNER ) W ON a.id = W.partner_id LEFT JOIN jde_vf03012 X ON X.AIAN8 = a.business_partner_no AND X.AICO = E.FIDL02 WHERE 1 = 1 AND a.delete_flag = 0 AND a.blacklist_flag = 0

title: Linux备份脚本踩坑记录
text: 脚本写错，备份数据循环打包123456789101112131415#!/bin/bashSOURCE_DIR=/home/pv/crmDEST_DIR=/mnt/CRM/Files#mkdir ${DEST_DIR}#当前时间作为文件名DATETIME=$(date +%Y-%m-%d_%H-%M-%S)#将要备份的文件夹中内容复制到目标目录/mnt/CRM/Files目录下cp -r ${SOURCE_DIR} ${DEST_DIR}#将复制过来的文件打包 并删除文件cd ${DEST_DIR}tar -zcvf ${DATETIME}.tar.gz ./rm -rf ${DEST_DIR}/crm#删除该文件夹下超过7天的文件find ${DEST_DIR} -mtime +7 -name "*.tar.gz" -exec rm -rf {} \; 1tar -zcvf ${DATETIME}.tar.gz ./ 这一句把之前的已经打包过的数据，又打包了一边

title: Docker容器mysql数据库数据导出备份
text: 查找mysql容器id1docker ps -aqf "name=mysql" 自动备份脚本1234567891011121314151617181920212223242526272829303132333435363738394041424344454647484950515253545556575859606162636465666768697071727374#!/bin/bash #获取容器idcontainer_id=`/usr/bin/docker ps -aqf "name=mysql"` echo "mysql的镜像ID is $container_id" #登录用户名mysql_user="root"#登录密码(注意 如果密码包含特殊符号 前面要用'\')mysql_password="Abcd1234!"mysql_port="xxx"#备份的数据库名#mysql_database="db1"#要备份的数据库名称，多个用空格分开隔开 如("db1" "db2" "db3")backup_db_arr=("nacos_devtest" "tw_tm_dev_cloudt_auth" "tw_tm_dev_system" "tw_tm_dev_tw5" "tw_tm_dev_workflow") #backup_db_arr=("nacos_devtest")# 是否删除过期数据expire_backup_delete="true"#过期天数expire_days=7 # 备份文件存放地址(根据实际情况填写)backup_location="/mnt/CRM/DB"#定义备份详细时间backup_time=`date +%Y%m%d%H%M`#定义备份目录中的年月日时间backup_Ymd=`date +%Y-%m-%d` #3天之前的日期backup_3ago=`date -d '4 days ago' +%Y-%m-%d` #备份文件夹全路径backup_dir=$backup_location/$backup_Ymd flag=`echo $?`# 判断有没有定义备份的数据库，如果定义则开始备份，否则退出备份if [ "$backup_db_arr" != "" ];then for dbname in ${backup_db_arr[@]} do echo "开始执行数据库 $dbname 备份..." `mkdir -p $backup_dir` # 备份指定数据库中数据 `docker exec $container_id mysqldump -u$mysql_user -p$mysql_password -F -B --default-character-set=utf8 $dbname > $backup_dir/bak-$dbname-$backup_time.sql` flag=`echo $?` if [ $flag == "0" ];then echo "数据库 $dbname 成功备份到 $backup_dir/bak-$dbname-$backup_time.sql" else echo "数据库 $dbname 备份失败!" fi doneelse echo "没有待备份的数据库，停止数据库备份" exitfi # 删除过期数据if [ "$expire_backup_delete" == "true" -a "$backup_dir"!="" ];then `find $backup_dir/ -type d -mtime +$expire_days | xargs rm -rf` echo "删除失效的数据库备份信息!"fi echo "所有的数据库已完成备份"exitfi 脚本原链接 设置计划任务 12crontab -e30 23 * * * /mnt/CRM/DB/mysqlbackup.sh

title: Linux备份文件夹
text: 1、创建备份目标文件夹1mkdir /mnt/CRM 2、创建备份脚本1vim backup.sh 12345678910111213141516#!/bin/bash#创建/root/bbb目录 用户存放备份文件SOURCE_DIR=/home/pv/crmDEST_DIR=/mnt/CRM/Files#mkdir ${DEST_DIR}#当前时间作为文件名DATETIME=$(date +%Y-%m-%d_%H-%M-%S)#将要备份的文件夹中内容复制到目标目录/home/bbb目录下cp -r ${SOURCE_DIR} ${DEST_DIR}#将复制过来的文件打包 并删除文件cd ${DEST_DIR}tar -zcvf ${DATETIME}.tar.gz ./rm -rf ${DEST_DIR}/examxx#删除该文件夹下超过2天的文件find ${DEST_DIR} -mtime +2 -name "*.tar.gz" -exec rm -rf {} \; 参考文章 3、赋予执行权限 1chmod 700 backup.sh 4、设置计划任务每天自动备份 123crontab -e插入00 23 *** /bin /sh /mnt/CRM/Files/backup.sh

title: 帆软大屏幕
text: 记一次帆软开发大屏前言公司车间输送线近期有客户来参观，老板要搞一块大屏幕，数据显示又不能太敏感。 实现 使用帆软的FVS大屏 —>学习路径 模板使用帆软市场免费模板 车间生成管理大屏 图片素材流程图使用阿里巴巴矢量图。 天气数据使用开放平台接口 效果图 翻工了两次，领导就是一句话不好看不漂亮。 怎么说呢，开始做之前还是要尽量多的了解领导的想法。。

title: Linux系统下Mysql数据库备份
text: – 备份Linux系统mysql数据库数据到Windows共享盘中 1、挂载Windows共享文件夹确保两台机器能够ping通 1.1 创建挂载目录1mkdir /data/winback/POS 1.2 挂载windows共享文件夹1sudo mount -t cifs -o username=username,password=password //192.168.3.12/bk/pos /data/winback/POS 12345cifs是Common Internet File System，通用internet文件系统username是windows用户名password是windows密码//192.168.3.12/bk/pos/data/winback/POS/是linux上挂载的目录 2、修改mysql配置文件注：小于5.6 版本请忽略 ​ mysql5.6 以后密码不能写在命令行里，要配置在mysql配置文件里 12345678在my.ini 或my.cnf中添加[mysql]user=rootpassword='root'[mysqldump]user=rootpassword='root' 3、创建备份脚本这是网上找的，原链接找不到了 123456789101112131415161718192021222324252627282930313233343536373839404142434445464748#!/bin/bash#一：导出备份文件#保存备份个数，备份7天数据number=7#挂载备份盘#备份保存路径backup_dir=/data/winback/POS#日期dd=`date +%Y-%m-%d-%H-%M-%S`#备份工具tool=mysqldump#用户名#username=root#密码#password=123456#mysql5.6以后不允许在命令行里使用明文密码#将要备份的数据库database_name=dbname#如果文件夹不存在则创建if [ ! -d $backup_dir ];then mkdir -p $backup_dir;fi#导出备份文件$tool --defaults-extra-file=/etc/my.cnf $database_name -R -E > $backup_dir/$database_name-$dd.sql#写创建备份日志echo "create $backup_dir/$database_name-$dd.dupm" >> $backup_dir/log.txt#找出需要删除的备份delfile=`ls -l -crt $backup_dir/*.sql | awk '{print $9 }' | head -1`#判断现在的备份数量是否大于$numbercount=`ls -l -crt $backup_dir/*.sql | awk '{print $9 }' | wc -l`if [ $count -gt $number ]then #删除最早生成的备份，只保留number数量的备份 rm $delfile #写删除文件日志 echo "delete $delfile" >> $backup_dir/log.txtfi 4、开启计划任务自动执行123crontab -e插入00 23 *** /bin /sh /data/winback/POS/PosBackup.sh

title: crontab
text: linux crontab 计划任务 安装crontab 1yum install crontabs 查看定时任务 1crontab -l 设置定时任务 1crontab -e 查看crontab状态 1systemctl status crond.service 启动crontab 1systemctl start crond.service 关闭crontab 1systemctl stop crond.service 重启crontab 1systemctl restart crond.service 每分钟执行一次 123456789101112131415161718192021222324252627282930# 修改/添加定时任务crontab -e# 每分钟把hello world字符串写入/home/string.txt文件中* * * * * echo "hello world" >> /home/string.txt更多案例# 修改/添加定时任务crontab -e# 每天3点执行* 3 * * * 执行的语句# 每天18点30分执行30 18 * * * 执行的语句# 每个月的1号的12点15分执行15 12 1 * * 执行的语句# 每年的3月1号的11点45分执行45 11 1 3 * 执行的语句# 每周三的16点30分执行30 16 * * 3 执行的语句# 第1列表示分钟1～59 每分钟用或者 /1表示 # 第2列表示小时1～23（0表示0点） # 第3列表示日期1～31 # 第4列表示月份1～12 # 第5列标识号星期0～6（0表示星期天） # 第6列要运行的命令

title: 帆软使用API接口数据
text: 1、使用ecilpse 打开FineReport工程 2、程序数据集 1234567891011121314151617181920212223242526272829303132333435363738394041424344454647484950515253package com.fr.data;import java.util.ArrayList;import java.util.List;import cn.hutool.http.HttpUtil;import cn.hutool.json.JSONObject;import cn.hutool.json.JSONUtil;public class WeatherInfo extends SimpleTableData { /** * 初始化列头 * * @return */ @Override public String[] initColumnNames() { return new String[] { "wea", "win", "win_speed", "tem_day", "tem_night" }; } /** * 加载行列数据 * * @return */ @Override public List<Object[]> loadData() { /** * 访问免费天气API 接口 获取天气数据 * */ String url = "https://v0.yiketianqi.com/free/day?appid=36978295&appsecret=4tAvI4fv&unescape=1"; /** * 获取返回值 * */ String Content = HttpUtil.get(url); JSONObject jsonObject = JSONUtil.parseObj(Content); String wea = jsonObject.getStr("wea"); String win = jsonObject.getStr("win").toString(); String win_speed = jsonObject.getStr("win_speed"); String tem_day = jsonObject.getStr("tem_day"); String tem_night = jsonObject.getStr("tem_night"); ArrayList<Object[]> valueList = new ArrayList(); valueList.add(new Object[] { wea, win, win_speed, tem_day, tem_night }); return valueList; }}

title: 帆软笔记
text: 帆软JavaScriptFineReport查询按钮事件在空间事件里添加JS代码 12# 调用查询按钮_g().parameterCommit(); 12# 调用填报页面提交按钮_g().verifyAndWriteReport(true);; FineReport弹窗1FR.Msg.toast("弹窗内容！"); 正则表达式去空格123var mcu=' Hello ';var mcu = mcu.replace(/^\s+|\s+$/g,""); 解决URL中文参数乱码问题1url = encodeURI(url) JS跳转其他界面1window.open(FR.cjkEncode("${servletURL}?reportlet=/demo/basic/DetailedDrillB.cpt&订单号=" + id + "&format=excel")); 1window.location.href="${servletURL}?reportlet=WMS%2FWMS111.cpt&itm=" + itm + "&lotn="+lotn+"&doco="+doco+"&rq="+rq+""; 获取控件 在参数界面、决策报表界面获取控件的方法是相同的，先获取决策报表，再通过控件名称来获取控件 12var Widget = this.options.form.getWidgetByName("WidgetName")var branchid=this.options.form.getWidgetByName("branchid").getValue(); 在 cpt 填报时获取控件，先获取报表对象 contentPane，再通过控件名称来获取控件 1var Widget = contentPane.getWidgetByName("WidgetName"); FineReport公式获取上一单元格内容 当前单元格B3取上一B3单元格的值B3[A3:-1] 获取当月第一天DATEINMONTH(TODAY(),1) 自定义下载链接结尾加上 &format=text 导出文本 format=excel 导出excel

title: 记录搭建hexo博客
text: 前言希望搭建此博客，记录每次所经之事 使用 Hexo家里有一台矿渣我家云，我用docker部署了halo博客，无奈1G内存的机器，一会就跑满了，而且还要内网穿透，算了还是只把它当成下载机吧。Hexo 虽然有点麻烦，但是可以放到Githu上。就选它了 Github新建仓库在Github 中新建仓库，仓库名称 xxx.github.io xxx是自己的github账号 创建新的分支由于上班回家两台终端，所以创建一个新的分支 hexo 存放博客源文件master 分支 存放生成的网页文件 安装 Node.js下载地址：这里 配置环境变量 命令行 node -v 检查是否安装成功 命令行 npm -v 检查是否安装成功 安装 Git安装Hexo搭建hexo新建一个空的文件夹，进入文件夹，右键 Git Bash Here 1npm install -g hexo-cli 初始化 1Hexo init 新建一篇博客 1hexo new "First" # 新建一个名为First的博客 生成网页 123hexo cleanhexo ghexo s 浏览器打开 localhost:4000 就可以看到博客了 主题配置美化参考链接
